params.title: Camera Component Parameters
params.description: screen_width (optional), screen_height (optional), screen_pos_x (optional), screen_pos_y (optional), always_center (optional), screen_fill (optional)

defaultSnippets.label: Full display Camera adjusted together with resolution Parameters

screen_fill.title: Adjust to resolution
screen_fill.description: Adjust camera window to match game window
screen_fill.markdownDescription: Adjust camera window to match game window

always_center.title: Centered
always_center.description: Should the entity always be in the centre of the camera?
always_center.markdownDescription: Should the entity always be in the centre of the camera?

screen_width.title: Camera Width
screen_width.description: Width of the camera pane in px
screen_width.markdownDescription: Width of the camera pane in px

screen_height.title: Camera height
screen_height.description: Height of the camera pane in px
screen_height.markdownDescription: Height of the camera pane in px

screen_pos_x.title: Camera Position X-axis
screen_pos_x.description: X-coordinate of the upper-left camera pane corner in px
screen_pos_x.markdownDescription: X-coordinate of the upper-left camera pane corner in px

screen_pos_y.title: Camera Position Y-axis
screen_pos_y.description: Y-coordinate of the upper-left camera pane corner in px
screen_pos_y.markdownDescription: Y-coordinate of the upper-left camera pane corner in px
